nasb.text: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, according to the promise of life in Christ Jesus,

esv.text: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God according to the promise of the life that is in Christ Jesus,

cnv.text: 奉　神旨意，憑著在基督耶穌裡的生命的應許，作基督耶穌使徒的保羅，

ccb.text: 我保罗奉上帝的旨意，按照在基督耶稣里所应许的生命做基督耶稣的使徒，

csbs.text: 照着神的旨意，按着在基督耶稣里的生命应许，做基督耶稣使徒的保罗，
